source_jobs.title: FP&A Analyst
source_jobs.description:
👥 ABOUT THE TEAM

Our FP&A team is evolving from a traditional reporting and forecasting function into a data-driven strategic one. We've ditched the clunky, manual spreadsheets of the past for a warehouse-first approach.

We lean into commercial analytics and work closely alongside our Data Analytics team. Using a modern stack (BigQuery, dbt, and Hex), we go beyond the numbers to find the "why" behind them. If you think FP&A should be a proactive strategic partner to the business rather than just a reporting function, you'll fit right in.




🚀 ABOUT THE ROLE & IMPACT

As our new FP&A Analyst, you'll be the bridge between raw data, financial health, and commercial action.

You'll help us automate and expand our reporting by building scalable models, understanding and reporting key metrics, and giving the wider business clear visibility into performance. Reporting is the groundwork, not the goal. The important part is using it to anchor the decisions we and the business make in our data.




🎯 WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Automation & Efficiency: Replace manual legwork with code — automating recurring tasks and reporting so the team can move faster and spend more time on high-value analysis.

 - Reporting & Visibility: Build and maintain scalable reporting that gives the business clear, reliable visibility into commercial and financial performance.

 - Forecasting: Own and continuously improve our forecasting process, making it more accurate, more automated, and more useful.

 - Modelling & Scenario Analysis: Support end-to-end financial modelling and scenario analysis to stress-test plans and inform key decisions.

 - Cross-Functional Partnering: Partner with Marketing, Ops, and other teams - feeding the forecasting process, supporting ad-hoc analysis, and surfacing the insights that improve how we operate.

 - Strategic Insights: Be the voice of the data - turning analysis into clear commercial commentary that helps the business decide what to do next.




🌟 WHO YOU ARE

 - A Commercial or Finance Background: You bring real experience from a commercial or finance role and are comfortable with core financial concepts (P&L, unit economics, financial metrics, etc.)

 - A Data-First Thinker: You see the move from traditional spreadsheet-based reporting and modelling to a warehouse-first approach as an evolution worth embracing. You're strong in SQL, ideally have some Python experience, and it's a big plus if you've used Hex (or other data visualisation tools).

 - A Commercial & D2C Enthusiast: You speak the language of subscriptions, living at the intersection of performance marketing and finance - intuitively connecting acquisition and CPA to growth, retention, churn, LTV, and cohort performance.

 - An AI-Forward Operator: You embrace modern tools, including LLMs, to enhance your work and streamline your workflows - freeing up time for the high-value analysis that makes the difference.

 - A Clear Communicator: You can take messy, multi-source data and turn it into something people genuinely understand - clear models and commentary that tell a coherent story and help others make decisions.




✨ OUR HIRING JOURNEY

We value your time. We’ve designed a streamlined, 4-step process to get us from "Hello" to "Welcome to the team" as quickly as possible:

 - Step 1: 👋 Intro chat with Talent Team (High-energy alignment alignment check)

 - Step 2: 🧠 Hiring Manager Interview (Tactical conversation focused on your craft)

 - Step 3: 🔄 The Remote Loop (2 to 4 focused interviews assessing technical and collaboration skills)

 - Step 4: 🎉 The Finish Line (Offer, equity/benefits breakdown, and onboarding)



___________________________________________________________________________




🚀 READY TO THRIVE? APPLY NOW

If you are genuinely excited about ZOE's mission and this opportunity, please don't hesitate to apply—even if you don't meet every single requirement listed. We fundamentally value potential and commitment above all else.

ZOE is an

source_jobs.title: Lead Product Designer - App Experience
source_jobs.description:
💛 ABOUT ZOE

ZOE is a gut health science company that turns world-leading science into everyday gut-health products. Our app helps you understand what you eat and how it affects your body — so you can build healthier habits and improve your gut health over time. It's like having a nutrition scientist and personalised advice in your pocket!




THE TL;DR

You’ll join our Product Design team, a small, multi-disciplinary group of Product, Content and Motion Designers, and UX Researchers.

We care deeply about solving user problems, creating joyful user experiences, delivering impact, and maintaining a high bar for craft. We challenge each other, learn together, and believe that doing great work should be fun.




🚀 THE BIG PICTURE

This role is focused on leading high-impact product design on the ZOE app.

You’ll partner closely with Product, Engineering, and Data Analytics, sometimes embedded within a team and sometimes working across multiple areas where your impact is most needed.

You'll work hands-on within product squads, using design as a problem-solving tool, shaping what we build. You'll take work from early problem framing through to high-quality execution, helping teams move from ambiguity to clarity.

You'll raise the bar through the work you produce, your critical thinking, and how you collaborate— bringing strong product taste, native app experience, and a deep focus on outcomes.




🎯 YOUR MISSION

End-to-end product design

 - Lead design across the full product design lifecycle, from problem framing and concept exploration to delivery and iteration.

 - Use design to explore and define solutions, not just execute against pre-defined requirements.

 - Translate complex behavioural and scientific concepts into simple, intuitive app experiences.

 - Balance user needs, business goals, and technical constraints to shape the right solutions.

Native app experience

 - Design for iOS and Android, with a strong understanding of platform conventions, patterns, and interaction models.

 - Create thoughtful, responsive, and polished mobile experiences, with attention to motion, feedback, and detail.

 - Work closely with engineers to ensure high-quality implementation.

Raising the quality bar

 - Bring strong visual and interaction design craft: layout, hierarchy, typography, and micro-interactions.

 - Lead through making, setting the standard via your own work.

 - Contribute to design critiques, pairing, and team discussions to elevate overall quality.

Cross-functional collaboration

 - Partner closely with Product and Engineering to define problems and shape direction.

 - Contribute to product strategy and decision-making, not just design execution.
   
   


🧠 YOUR DNA

Experience & craft

 - Have a portfolio showing strong end-to-end product design work on native apps, with clear impact.

 - Bring high-quality UI and interaction design craft.

 - Have experience designing and shipping B2C mobile app experiences (iOS and/or Android).

 - Are comfortable working from early concepts through to detailed execution.

Thinking & mindset

 - Use design as a problem-solving tool, not just a delivery function.

 - Frame work around user and business problems, not features or screens.

 - Are comfortable with ambiguity and can create clarity through exploration.

 - Think in flows, systems, and behaviours, not just individual screens.

 - Care about outcomes and impact, not just output.

Ways of working

 - Are a maker first — you lead through doing.

 - Collaborate closely with Product and Engineering as partners.

 - Communicate ideas clearly and bring others along with your thinking.

 - Are low-ego, pragmatic, and focused on what works.

 - Take ownership and follow through.
   
   


🌱 WHY JOIN ZOE?

 - Work on meaningful problems with real impact on people’s health.

 - Operate at the intersection of science, product, and growth.

 - Shape critical revenue and member journeys at a pivotal stage of growth.

 - Collabora

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Data Scientist
source_jobs.description:
🚀 THE BIG PICTURE

As a Senior Product & Growth Data Scientist, you'll be a key driver of how data shapes our product and growth decisions. You’ll combine product analytics, experimentation, and applied statistical / ML modelling to influence ZOE’s strategy, roadmap, and member experience.

You'll partner with product and growth teams to determine when descriptive analytics is sufficient and when predictive or causal models materially improve our ability to help members. We believe most decisions are reversible, so you'll balance statistical rigour with pragmatism — helping us move forward with ~70% evidence and iterating as we learn.




👥 THE SQUAD

At ZOE, we're on a mission to empower people with the most advanced science and technology to transform their health. Data is at the heart of how we build products that deliver measurable health outcomes — and how we get those products in front of millions of people.

You'll sit within our Product & Growth Analytics team, a close-knit group of six experts where we pride ourselves on a diverse range of perspectives (our current split is 80% female and 20% male). You’ll work closely with closely with Product Managers, Growth Marketers, Designers and Engineers. The team combines analytics engineering, experimentation, and product data science — and you'll have a meaningful voice in how we raise the bar.




🎯 YOUR MISSION

 - Optimise the growth journey: Analyse our acquisition funnel — from ad spend through quiz, signup, and activation — to find where we're leaking users and where small changes compound into big wins. Help us reach millions efficiently.

 - Run high-quality experiments: Design and analyse experiments across product and growth surfaces. Bring statistical rigour — (sequential testing, CUPED, uplift) to help us learn faster without sacrificing quality.

 - Shape strategy through metrics: Build and evolve metrics across acquisition, activation, engagement, retention, and monetisation. Surface the risks and leverage points that change what we prioritise.

 - Predict & Influence User Behaviour: Use causal and inferential methods (e.g., uplift modelling, regression, survival analysis) to move beyond "what happened" to "why." Develop lightweight ML models and segmentations that identify the specific levers driving long-term retention, conversion, and LTV.

 - Collaborate with Leadership: Act as a trusted analytics partner for the growth domain. You’ll communicate complex insights to senior stakeholders (including the C-suite), providing the data-driven confidence needed to shape company strategy.

 - Elevate our foundations: Work with dbt and our instrumentation layers to ensure the data we rely on is high-quality. You’ll help design data systems that serve multiple use cases across the team.

 - Apply a "So What?" Filter: We value clarity over complexity. You’ll be empowered to choose the simplest effective solution and pivot quickly when a hypothesis is disproven.
   
   


🧠 YOUR DNA

 - 5+ years of experience in product analytics, growth analytics, data science where you have owned analytics domains and influenced product intent.

 - Strong quantitative foundation — whether through a degree (Statistics, Maths, CS, Engineering, Physics, Economics, or similar) or a track record of working through genuinely complex quantitative problems

 - Deep proficiency in SQL and Python, with hands-on experience in statistical modelling(e.g.; regression, classification, or time-to-event analysis).

 - Experience running rigorous experimentation and a clear point of view on what good looks like.

 - Familiarity with LTV, churn, retention, or conversion modelling — and translating predictions into concrete product or marketing interventions

 - The ability to translate complex technical findings into clear, actionable stories for stakeholders. You are comfortable sharing your perspective, even when it challenges the status quo.

 - You thrive in dynamic environments and are comfortable

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer (FE Focused)
source_jobs.description:
👥 ABOUT THE TEAM

At ZOE, we're on a mission to empower people with the most advanced science and technology to transform their health.

Our Engineering team sits at the heart of that mission. We’re a ~40 distributed team across the UK and EU, who thrive on solving complex challenges together. We bring a wide mix of skills — from front-end, back-end, full-stack, and mobile engineering to machine learning, data science, and analytics — to build the experiences that guide our members through their health journey.

We’re proud of the diversity in our team: 39% female and 61% male, with colleagues from many different backgrounds, cultures, and lived experiences. We believe this diversity makes us stronger, more creative, and better equipped to serve our global community.

Collaboration is core to how we work. Engineers at ZOE partner closely with data scientists and analysts, product managers, and product designers to bring new ideas to life. Depending on the project, we also work hand-in-hand with marketing, finance, legal, and other teams, making our work highly cross-functional and impactful.

Above all, we value curiosity, openness, and empowerment. We encourage everyone to share ideas, learn continuously, and shape how we work — whether it’s through experimenting with new technology, improving our ways of working, or finding better ways to support our members.




🚀 ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Full-Stack Engineer (Front-End Focused) to help us build world-class digital experiences. While ZOE maintains a full-stack environment, this specific role is designed for someone who is passionate about crafting seamless, performant, responsive and beautiful user interfaces across web and mobile.

You will spend the majority of your time in TypeScript, React, and Next.js, but you’ll also dive into our backend services (Kotlin or Python) to ensure the data you need is available, structured correctly, and delivered efficiently. You will contribute to shape and grow our web design system, collaborating closely with design and engineering. You will be launching A/B tests and will collaborate with analysts to interpret results.



💻 Our Stack

 - Backend: Kotlin / Spring Boot, Python / FastAPI & Django

 - Frontend: TypeScript, React Native, Next.js, GraphQL

 - Tools: GTM, Headless CMS, Optimizely, Google Pub/Sub, Grafana, Firebase Auth,

 - CI/CD: ArgoCD, GitHub Actions

 - Data: Web data layer, dbt, BigQuery, Airflow

 - Infrastructure: GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform, Vercel




🎯 WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 - Developing a best-in-class, beautiful website that is fully performant and on-brand.

 - Bridging the Stack: Collaborating on API design and occasionally implementing backend changes to support new front-end functionality.

 - Design Partnership: Working hand-in-hand with UX Designers to turn high-fidelity mocks into fluid, accessible, and performant components.

 - Engineering Excellence: Writing clean, testable code and contributing to our shared component libraries and design systems.

 - Rapid Iteration: Shipping to production regularly (ideally daily) and using data/feedback to refine the user journey.

 - Growth: Supporting and learning from senior engineers while mentoring others as you grow into a technical owner.




🧠 WE THINK YOU WOULD BE GREAT IF YOU…

 - Have 3–5 years of experience in software development with a heavy focus on the front-end.

 - Possess Deep Expertise in TypeScript, React, and Next.js. You understand state management, hooks, and how to optimize for web performance.

 - Have Working Knowledge of a backend language (like Python, Kotlin, or Java) and feel comfortable navigating an API or database schema.

 - Are a Pragmatic Engineer—you favour simple, maintainable solutions over "clever" over-engineering.

 - Thrive in Collaborative Environments and enjoy the "why" behind a product feature just as much as the "how."




✨ OUR HIRING JOURNEY

We value your time. We’ve designed a streamlined, 4-step process

source_jobs.title: Podcast Production Associate
source_jobs.description:
🚀 THE ROLE

The ZOE Science & Nutrition podcast is one of the world’s leading health podcasts, reaching millions of listeners every month.

We’re looking for an exceptionally organised, curious and ambitious person to help us reach the next stage of growth for the show. You’ll work across guest research, production, editorial and operations, helping bring world-class conversations to life while learning how a high-performing podcast operates behind the scenes.

This a full-time UK-based role ideal for someone who quickly learns and takes ownership. You’ll attend recordings in the UK and internationally, support podcast growth, and play a hands-on role in bringing every episode to life.




👥 THE TEAM

The superstar team you’ll work directly with:

 - ZOE’s Podcast Production Manager (your line manager)

 - ZOE’s leadership, expert spokespeople and contributors

 - ZOE’s Content, Creative Studio, Marketing, Product, and PR teams

 - World-leading scientists, researchers, clinicians and health influencers

 - External production partners, freelancers and recording studios
   
   


🎯 WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

🎙️ Production & Guest Coordination: Coordinate podcast recordings from planning through to publication, managing guest communications, scheduling and recording logistics to ensure every episode runs smoothly and on schedule.

🔬 Research & Editorial Support: Research guests, topics and audience interests while creating guest briefs, prep documents and research summaries that help shape stronger conversations and better episodes.

⚙️ Operations & Continuous Improvement: Manage production tracking, release forms, documentation and operational processes while continually improving the systems and workflows that support the podcast.

📈 Publishing & Performance: Support episode publishing across podcast and video platforms, managing metadata, quality checks, reporting dashboards, operational trackers, listener feedback and performance trends to help improve the podcast over time.




🧠 WHAT YOU’LL BRING (THE MUST-HAVE CORE COMPETENCIES)

 - Podcast Experience: Experience working on a podcast.

 - Media & Content: Experience in media, journalism or content production.

 - Exceptional Organisation: Exceptional organisational skills and attention to detail.

 - Written Communication: Strong written communication skills.

 - Project Coordination: Experience managing projects, coordinating stakeholders or running complex processes.

 - AI Confidence: Confidence using AI tools to research, learn and improve your work.

 - Love of Great Content: A genuine love of podcasts, media or storytelling.

 - Learning Mindset: You learn quickly and enjoy tackling unfamiliar topics.

 - Ownership: You take ownership rather than waiting to be told what to do.

 - Curiosity: You’re naturally curious and ask great questions.

 - Problem Solving: You enjoy solving problems and improving how things work.

 - Collaboration: You’re comfortable working with smart, ambitious people and receiving direct feedback.

 - High Standards: You care about doing excellent work, even when nobody is watching.
   
   


BONUS EXPERIENCE!

 - Interest in Health & Science: You’re knowledgeable or curious to learn about nutrition, health, and evidence-based content.

 - Community Awareness: Experience engaging with audiences through comments or community management.

 - Systems Thinking: You’re comfortable working within structured workflows and improving how content gets made and delivered.

 - Platform Expansion: Experience or interest in launching and growing new channels.
   
   


💫 WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS ROLE

🎙️ Help build one of the world’s leading health podcasts.

🌍 Attend recordings across the UK and internationally.

🧠 Work directly with world-leading scientists, doctors, researchers and authors.

🚀 Join a small team where your ideas will genuinely shape how the podcast operates.

📈 Learn every part of a high-performing podcast operation, from research and productio

source_jobs.title: Campaign Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
🚀 ABOUT THE ROLE

ZOE is growing fast and we’re looking for a Campaign Marketing Manager to join our Marketing team.

You’ll report into the General Manager for Daily 30, a senior marketing leader responsible for driving growth and brand impact across ZOE’s portfolio. While your home base sits within that team, your remit spans ZOE-wide marketing campaigns, supporting some of our most important brand, product, and commercial moments.

This is a highly operational, high-impact role: you are the person who turns ideas into reality—bringing structure, pace, and clarity to how campaigns are planned, briefed, and executed across the business.

You’ll combine strong project management with a marketer’s instinct for what “great” looks like, ensuring campaigns land consistently across every channel.

You’ll also actively use AI tools and workflows to move faster, improve quality, and scale how we plan, create, and analyse campaigns.




🎯 WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING




OWN ZOE-WIDE CAMPAIGN DELIVERY

 - Run end-to-end delivery of integrated campaigns across ZOE marketing

 - Own the “moments” calendar across brand, product, and growth initiatives

 - Bring order, pace, and accountability to multiple live campaigns at once


TURN STRATEGY INTO EXECUTION

 - Translate marketing strategy into clear, actionable campaign plans

 - Align stakeholders, channel owners, and timelines into one coherent execution plan

 - Write high-quality briefs that set teams up for excellent execution

 - Use AI to speed up planning, structuring, and iteration


DELIVER ACROSS THREE TIERS OF WORK

 - Tier 1 – Brand-defining moments
   
   Flagship campaigns like major brand storytelling platforms

 - Tier 2 – Commercial growth moments
   
   Gifting, Cyber 5, launches, partnerships, and key revenue drivers

 - Tier 3 – Always-on coordination
   
   Ensuring consistent messaging across organic, CRM, podcasts, and content


ORCHESTRATE CROSS-FUNCTIONAL DELIVERY

 - Coordinate channel owners across Brand, Growth, Content, Product, and Design

 - Ensure each team has what they need—and executes to a high standard

 - Manage external partners and agencies where relevant


MAKE CAMPAIGNS COME ALIVE

 - Collaborate with creative teams to deliver high-quality multi-channel content

 - Support execution across social, email, paid, blog, and partnership assets

 - Ensure output is consistent with strategy and audience insight


TEST, SCALE, AND EXPERIMENT

 - Support initiatives like affiliate marketing, gifting, sampling, and partnerships

 - Help assess what we build in-house vs what we outsource

 - Identify opportunities to scale new growth channels


TRACK PERFORMANCE AND IMPROVE

 - Monitor campaign performance across channels

 - Turn data into clear insights and actions

 - Feed learnings back into future campaign planning


WORK SMARTER WITH AI

 - Use AI to accelerate briefing, content iteration, and analysis

 - Embed AI into everyday campaign workflows

 - Continuously improve speed, quality, and scalability


STAY SHARP ON WHAT GOOD LOOKS LIKE

 - Keep up with marketing trends, competitors, and best practice

 - Bring strong opinions on high-quality campaign execution
   
   


🧠 WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 3–5+ years in campaign or integrated marketing roles

 - Proven experience delivering end-to-end campaigns across multiple channels

 - Strong project management skills with ability to juggle complexity and pace

 - Deep understanding of digital channels (social, email, paid, content, partnerships)

 - Strong cross-functional operator who can align multiple stakeholders

 - Analytical mindset with ability to turn performance data into action

 - Experience in fast-paced, high-growth environments

 - Strong point of view on what “great” campaign execution looks like

 - Highly organised, clear communicator, and execution-focused

 - Comfortable using AI tools as part of modern marketing workflows

 - Passion for ZOE’s mission and interest in health, nutrition, and

notes: ZOE is a health science company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles, including engineering, product design, and marketing positions.
